title: vicia deflexa var. minor
intro: Vicia deflexa var. minor, also known as the lesser hop or narrowleaf vetch, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat kidney stones and urinary issues. The health benefits of Vicia deflexa var. minor include its ability to help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and its leaves and stems can also be used in herbal remedies.
